name: excali-save
description: Chrome extension for excalidraw.com: save and restore canvas snapshots from localStorage.

scripts.generate-icons: cd public && magick logo.jpeg -resize 16x16 -strip icon16.png && magick logo.jpeg -resize 32x32 -strip icon32.png && magick logo.jpeg -resize 48x48 -strip icon48.png && magick logo.jpeg -resize 128x128 -strip icon128.png
